---
title: "03. 困阻与险难"
subtitle: "Obstruction, Danger, and the Abysmal"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 3
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How 需、讼、坎、蹇、困、井 map danger, blockage, and deep source structure onto spaced-yang stability, fold resolution, and fiber absorption."
---

**Hexagrams:** 需(5), 讼(6), 坎(29), 蹇(39), 困(47), 井(48)  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `fold operator`, `fiber structure`

{{< include articles/category_03_obstruction_danger_abysmal.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_03_obstruction_danger_abysmal_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_03_obstruction_danger_abysmal_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_03_obstruction_danger_abysmal_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_03_obstruction_danger_abysmal_infographic.png)
